flashcards.definition: s = rθ, where s is the arc length, r is the radius, and θ is the central angle in radians.
A = ½r²θ, where A is the sector area, r is the radius, and θ is the central angle in radians.
A 'pie-slice' region bounded by two radii and an arc of a circle.
An angle whose vertex is at the center of a circle and whose sides are radii.
A portion of the circumference of a circle.
